decision: Defect escape hatch — proactive log polling → auto-ticketing

steps.action: Defect escape hatch — proactive log polling → auto-ticketing
steps.notes: Defect poller + alert routing shipped. defect-poller.sh queries Loki every 5min via launchd, deduplicates error patterns, auto-cards defects. Alert webhook wired to Grafana, macOS desktop notifications for critical alerts.

Verified: mechanism is sound, poller is live (launchd running, state file tracking 16 defects). Found critical bug: FALSE_POSITIVES bash array can't be exported to Python subprocess — name collision causes all 13 false positive patterns to be empty in Python. Result: 12 of 16 auto-created cards are noise (write-scrubber, infra-guardrails, chorus-audit, grafana-alerts). Fix: rename export var from FALSE_POSITIVES to FP_PATTERNS on line 434. Also: cards #162-173 should be closed as false positives, cards #158-161 are legitimate app defects for Kade.

history.detail: Workflow created: Defect escape hatch — proactive log polling → auto-ticketing

Result: 12 of 16 auto-created cards are noise (write-scrubber, infra-guardrails, chorus-audit, grafana-alerts). Fix: rename export var from FALSE_POSITIVES to FP_PATTERNS on line 434.
